name: Chocolate Spritz
recipeIngredient: 2 ounces Semisweet chocolate, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter in a large mixing bowl with an electric mixer on medium speed for 30 seconds.
2. Add sugar and cocoa powder and baking powder; beat well.
3. Add egg and vanilla; beat until well combined.
4. Beat in as much flour as you can, then stir in any remaining flour with a wooden spoon.
5. Do not chill dough.
6. Pack dough into a cookie press. Force dough through the press onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 375°F for 8 to 10 minutes, or until edges of cookies are firm but not brown. Remove cookies and cool on wire racks.
8. Melt chocolate or candy coating and shortening in a small heavy saucepan.
9. Place cookies on waxed paper; drizzle with the melted mixture. Let stand until drizzle is set.
Makes about 84 cookies.
